author: Grub Basket
description: Create and share curated lists of community plugins. Share a pack as a link or code; recipients preview the pack and install everything in a couple of clicks. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Human
manifest.description: Create and share curated lists of community plugins. Share a pack as a link or code; recipients preview the pack and install everything in a couple of clicks.
manifest.name: Starter Packs

name: Starter Packs

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes since 0.5.0

- fix: resolve Obsidian community-store review findings; v0.5.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes since the beginning

- ci: add GitHub Actions release workflow (build + release on manifest bump)
- docs: README limitations+security section, PITCH — vault replication is a separate plugin
- feat: Help & limitations settings section + DIY vault-replication checklist; v0.5.0
- chore: untrack CLAUDE.md (keep dev notes local, out of the public repo)
- docs: README — plugins disabled by default + Enable all/Disable all
- feat: install plugins disabled by default + Enable all/Disable all in preview; v0.4.0
- docs: README — themes are now in packs (v0.3.0), snippets deferred
- feat: include community themes in packs (create/share/import/install/apply); v0.3.0
- docs: README — export-as-note, staggered install, mobile note, authorship design note
- feat: Export pack as note (writes the markdown share form into the vault)
- feat: staggered install-all with progress bar + persistent notification; v0.2.0
- docs: add PITCH.md and a 'Similar plugins' section to the README
- fix: badge reads 'Installed (Disabled)' instead of 'Installed (off)'; v0.1.2
- chore: add MIT license
- fix: 12px gap between import-modal action buttons and the plugin list; v0.1.1
- docs: CLAUDE.md (project facts) + README (user-facing guide)
- feat: starter packs v0.1.0 — create, share, and import plugin packs
- scaffold: Obsidian plugin project setup for Starter Packs
